comparison.comparison_note: the closed estimate is an upper bound at tau^(-beta), not a tau^-2 lower-source mechanism

control_card.C: deterministic Python audit consuming Sprint130 summary and emitting rows JSON, summary JSON, and Markdown
control_card.F: missing Sprint130 receipt, failed scaling gate, marker hit, or Clay promotion fails closed
control_card.G: exit code is 0 exactly when all rows pass, source_upper_bound_closed is true, and Clay remains unpromoted
control_card.L: the ledger records comparison against tau^-2 and tau^-1 source scales
control_card.O: Worker 1 owns only the Sprint131 source upper-bound audit script and matching output directory
control_card.P: use the bound as an obstruction-class source upper bound, not as a quadratic source construction
control_card.R: close RigorousSourceUpperBound from the Sprint130 U1 maximum-principle receipt without Clay promotion
control_card.S: Sprint130 L-infinity input, delta scale, product identity, derivative scale, and source upper bound all close

source_bound.derivation: using |u1|<=M0 and |partial_z u1|<=C_u M0 tau^(-beta), |partial_z(u1^2)|<=2 C_u M0^2 tau^(-beta)
source_bound.derivative_scale: |partial_z u1| <= C_u M0/delta = C_u M0 tau^(-beta)
